scripts.web: npm run dev --workspace=packages/api & npm run dev --workspace=packages/client -- --open
scripts.//typecheck: types and db are pre-built explicitly because api (alphabetically first) depends on their emitted .d.ts; without this, workspace typecheck order leaves stale dist/
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=packages/types && npm run build --workspace=packages/db && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.queue:clear: docker compose exec db psql -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-ffxi} ${POSTGRES_DB:-ffxi_crafting} -c "DELETE FROM pgboss.job;"
scripts.db:reset: docker compose exec db psql -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-ffxi} postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS ${POSTGRES_DB:-ffxi_crafting};" && docker compose exec db psql -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-ffxi} postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE ${POSTGRES_DB:-ffxi_crafting};" && npm run db:push --workspace=packages/db
